about.title: About LAGMED
about.subtitle: Who We Are
about.description: Based in Bordj Bou Arreridj, Algeria, LAGMED is a leading supplier of high-quality medical equipment. We provide healthcare facilities across Algeria with certified, reliable medical devices and equipment.
about.mission: Our mission is to improve healthcare quality by providing cutting-edge medical equipment at competitive prices.

why_us.title: Why Choose LAGMED?
why_us.quality_desc: All our equipment meets international quality and safety standards.
why_us.delivery_desc: Reliable delivery service across all of Algeria.
why_us.support_desc: Our technical team provides full after-sales support and training.
why_us.pricing_desc: Best prices guaranteed with flexible payment options.
